title: Reality
lyrics: 🎼 Ooh, this new reality What a day, I should awake I'm living through heartbreak Am I looking for heartache? At the end of the road it all goes down I don't know how to uplift everything I don't know to uplift my sin My dreams, my life Make it fit for everyone It's always, always Lost in reality Maybe it's always Lost in the right thing to say Reality, please I'm sorry you see this face It's reality based on you Then the stars come and show me mine Then the stars come and make me fine It takes more of me to be more of you To be better than all people that I call My fathers that came before Mothers that came before them Did they look the same? Not in the light of all this deceit Yeah, in the light of apartment and street Do we see what they've just done? Do we see what all this has done for us? To center around the world inside of us Instead of understanding that we all Take the rotation of the planet slow Listen, I just can't stand reality based bullshit Reality based hit this You wanna fight for what? So you can just take and then call your own It's not that big an earthquake You know, we can be nice Kind to ourselves, we know Dice to the sewer, dice to the level One day it's gotta be our own I promise you this reality view This reality heartbreak There's something better for you Reality view, reality heartbreak There's something like a cleaner view Heart level Heart level I got a little trouble, little trouble To my heart level Yeah, yeah At least now it shows, at least now it does Verbally you tell me, you tell myself At night, night, I'm fine, I'm gonna be alright At night, I know I'm kind, I'm gonna be alright And after the end, just know We're here for you In the end, and in the night You, you, it's all we get It's the boat Hurt you too much Just understand that's reality And the gifts that you got Just can't get like up, not I just up, not Wait, I just threw up on myself Oh, I'm sorry, was that you? I'm sorry, excuse me Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: Ooh, this new reality
What a day, I should awake
I'm living through heartbreak
Am I looking for heartache?
At the end of the road it all goes down
I don't know how to uplift everything
I don't know to uplift my sin
My dreams, my life
Make it fit for everyone
It's always, always
Lost in reality
Maybe it's always
Lost in the right thing to say
Reality, please
I'm sorry you see this face
It's reality based on you
Then the stars come and show me mine
Then the stars come and make me fine
It takes more of me to be more of you
To be better than all people that I call
My fathers that came before
Mothers that came before them
Did they look the same?
Not in the light of all this deceit
Yeah, in the light of apartment and street
Do we see what they've just done?
Do we see what all this has done for us?
To center around the world inside of us
Instead of understanding that we all
Take the rotation of the planet slow
Listen, I just can't stand reality based bullshit
Reality based hit this
You wanna fight for what?
So you can just take and then call your own
It's not that big an earthquake
You know, we can be nice
Kind to ourselves, we know
Dice to the sewer, dice to the level
One day it's gotta be our own
I promise you this reality view
This reality heartbreak
There's something better for you
Reality view, reality heartbreak
There's something like a cleaner view
Heart level
Heart level
I got a little trouble, little trouble
To my heart level
Yeah, yeah
At least now it shows, at least now it does
Verbally you tell me, you tell myself
At night, night, I'm fine, I'm gonna be alright
At night, I know I'm kind, I'm gonna be alright
And after the end, just know
We're here for you
In the end, and in the night
You, you, it's all we get
It's the boat
Hurt you too much
Just understand that's reality
And the gifts that you got
Just can't get like up, not I just up, not
Wait, I just threw up on myself
Oh, I'm sorry, was that you?
I'm sorry, excuse me
Thanks for watching!
